TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lidaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,118 buwan, 2,835 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 899 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 1,936 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 29%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lidaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga Pukpuk. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ li*aw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa taraʦ~ʨan. taj ʔzil na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa pukpuk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lidaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,118 buwan, 2,835 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 899 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 1,936 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 29%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lidaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga Pukpuk. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ li*aw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa taraʦ~ʨan. taj ʔzil na li*aw ħjaʔ ɣa pukpuk. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
